name: Prodigy Gold NL
description: Prodigy Gold NL is an Australian-based mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of gold resources. Headquartered in Perth, the company maintains a significant exploration portfolio primarily located within the Tanami Gold district of the Northern Territory. Prodigy Gold is dedicated to unlocking value through both greenfield and brownfield exploration projects, leveraging its expertise to identify and evaluate high-potential mineral assets. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: PRX) and continues to pursue strategic partnerships and exploration activities to advance its key projects toward development.
